evals.prompt: Generate and rank five startup ideas for solo AI tools in education that can be validated in one week.
evals.expected_output: The agent returns a ranked set with instinct, proven base, better claim, hook, distribution, retention, and cheap validation test for each idea.
assertions: Provides all Proven Better New columns in the output.
Ranks ideas with a clear rationale.
Includes a one-week cheap validation test per idea.

evals.prompt: Pressure test this rough concept: 'AI travel coordinator that rebooks disrupted itineraries'.
evals.expected_output: The agent preserves the concept, separates proven assumptions from hope, and returns continue/kill criteria plus a first validation test.
assertions: Clearly labels evidence-backed claims versus hypotheses.
Offers one concrete cheap experiment before full build.
